app.sections.conditions_generales_page.intro: These general terms govern sales made through the My Own Tea online shop and describe the rules applicable to ordering, payment, delivery, subscriptions and complaints.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.scope_p1: These general terms apply to sales concluded on the My Own Tea shop with consumer customers.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.scope_p2: The shop offers, in particular, personalized blends, accessories and, where available, subscriptions related to My Own Tea creations.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.order_p1: The customer selects products, reviews the cart, enters delivery and billing details, then validates the order with an obligation to pay.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.order_p2: An order is only considered accepted after payment confirmation and the sending of an order summary by email.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.order_b1: The customer must verify the accuracy of the information entered before validation.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.order_b2: Visuals, compositions and advice displayed on the site are informative and may show minor variations linked to natural ingredients or personalization.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.order_b3: My Own Tea may refuse or cancel an order in the event of a clear anomaly, unpaid amount or exceptional unavailability.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.personalized_p1: My Own Tea creations are assembled from the choices made in the workshop: ingredients, format and, where relevant, personalization settings.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.personalized_p2: Taste notes, preparation tips and perceived benefits are provided for guidance only and do not constitute either a contractual promise of result or medical advice.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.personalized_b1: The customer remains responsible for the consistency of their choices before validation.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.personalized_b2: A personalized creation can no longer be modified once preparation has started.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.price_payment_p1: Prices are displayed in euros including tax. Applicable delivery costs are shown before the order is confirmed.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.price_payment_p2: Payment is secured via Stripe. Depending on the device, browser and domain setup, Apple Pay or Google Pay may also be available.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.price_payment_b1: No extra fee is charged for the payment method used.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.price_payment_b2: The charge occurs according to the payment flow selected and the effective validation of the transaction.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.shipping_p1: Delivery is currently available in France and Belgium, to home addresses or relay points depending on the address and the shipping offers available.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.shipping_p2: The order is prepared after payment confirmation, then handed over to the carrier with a tracking link when available.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.shipping_b1: Preparation and transport times are indicative.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.shipping_b2: Customers can view tracking in My Account > Orders when using a customer account.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.shipping_b3: Risk transfers when the parcel is physically received by the customer or by a designated third party.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.subscription_p1: Subscriptions are reserved for eligible My Own Tea creations. They require an active customer account and a usable delivery address.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.subscription_p2: Subscription management, card details, billing cycles and invoices are handled from the secure customer account.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.subscription_b2: The pricing conditions displayed at the time of subscription apply to the selected offer.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.subscription_b3: Standard subscription shipping is calculated from the active address at the time of subscription.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.withdrawal_p1: Under distance-selling rules, a standard non-personalized accessory may fall within the scope of the right of withdrawal when eligible.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.withdrawal_p2: However, My Own Tea creations made, assembled or personalized on demand cannot be returned for a simple change of mind.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.withdrawal_b1: Before sending anything back, contact support to obtain the applicable procedure.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.withdrawal_b2: Legal warranties applicable in the event of a defect, mistake or non-conformity remain unaffected.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.support_p1: For any question relating to an order, payment, delivery, subscription or complaint, customer support should be contacted first.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.support_b3: Please include your order number and the subject of your request.
app.sections.conditions_generales_page.support_b4: If a difficulty remains unresolved, the consumer's legal rights still apply.

app.sections.contact_page.before_contact_body: Before writing to us, check the FAQ or your order tracking for the most common questions.
app.sections.contact_page.email_body: For product, order, account or partnership requests, our team replies through this address.
app.sections.contact_page.lundi_vendredi_heure: Monday to Friday, 9 a.m. to 6 p.m. (Paris time).
app.sections.contact_page.form_intro: Choose the subject of your request, fill in your details and prepare a clear email in a few seconds.
app.sections.contact_page.ingredient_request_body: Looking for an ingredient that is missing from our workshop? Tell us which one and we will gladly review it.
app.sections.contact_page.equipe_vous_accompagne: Our team supports you with your orders, your personalized creations and the management of your account.
app.sections.contact_page.message_placeholder: Describe your request with as much useful context as possible.
app.sections.contact_page.order_help_body: For an order-related request, include your order number when possible so we can answer faster.
app.sections.contact_page.error_message: Unable to send your message right now.
app.sections.contact_page.success_message: Your message has been sent. Our team will get back to you as soon as possible.

app.sections.creator.indique_puissance_flavors: Indicates the power of the flavors of this tea. From subtle and delicate to a frank and full-bodied taste.

app.sections.creator.persistante_aromatic_apres: Persistent aromatic after swallowing. Ranging from quickly disappearing to very long, evolving and expressive.

app.sections.creator.suivez_etapes_assemblez: Follow the steps and assemble your perfect composition. Up to 10 ingredients for a harmonious blend.

app.sections.faq_page.intro: Quick answers to the most common questions about blend creation, ordering, delivery, subscriptions, customer accounts and personal data.
app.sections.faq_page.q1_title: How do I create a personalized blend?
app.sections.faq_page.q1_p1: Use the My Own Tea workshop to select your ingredients, choose a format and refine your recipe. The price updates automatically according to the composition.
app.sections.faq_page.q1_p2: The base-free infusion mode is supported with a dedicated pricing rule so the composition remains coherent.
app.sections.faq_page.q2_title: Do I need a customer account?
app.sections.faq_page.q2_p1: A customer account is not strictly required for a one-off order, but it is strongly recommended to find your orders, track parcels, save addresses and manage preferences. It is required to manage a subscription.
app.sections.faq_page.q3_title: Which payment methods do you accept?
app.sections.faq_page.q3_p1: Payment is secured via Stripe. Card payments are supported, and Apple Pay / Google Pay may also be offered depending on the device, browser and domain setup.
app.sections.faq_page.q4_p1: The shop currently delivers to France and Belgium. The options shown at checkout depend on the country, postal code and shipping offers available in real time.
app.sections.faq_page.q5_title: Can I choose a relay point?
app.sections.faq_page.q5_p1: Yes, when a relay-point offer is available for your address. The relay point is chosen directly during checkout; otherwise only home delivery is offered.
app.sections.faq_page.q6_title: How can I track my order?
app.sections.faq_page.q6_p1: As soon as the parcel is shipped, a shipping confirmation email is sent. Tracking is also visible in My Account > Orders when you use a customer account.
app.sections.faq_page.q7_title: Can I change an order that has already been paid?
app.sections.faq_page.q7_p1: Contact support as soon as possible. If preparation has not started yet, some corrections may sometimes be reviewed. Once preparation or shipping has begun, changes are no longer guaranteed.
app.sections.faq_page.q8_p1: My Own Tea creations and products are not taken back for a simple change of mind. If an item is damaged, wrongly prepared or non-compliant, contact us quickly with your order number and, if possible, photos. For a standard accessory, support will confirm the applicable procedure before any return.
app.sections.faq_page.q9_p1: Subscriptions are reserved for eligible My Own Tea creations. They are managed from the customer account: card details, billing cycles, end-of-term cancellation, reactivation and invoices.
app.sections.faq_page.q10_title: How do I manage my emails and data?
app.sections.faq_page.q10_p1: From My Account > Information, you can update your personal details, addresses and email preferences. You can also use the unsubscribe link present in every marketing email or write to {{contactEmail}} for a data-related request.
app.sections.faq_page.q11_title: What should I do if I have an issue with my order or delivery?
app.sections.faq_page.q11_p1: Write to us at {{contactEmail}} and include your order number, the problem observed and, when useful, photos. Each case is reviewed individually so we can offer the most appropriate solution.

app.sections.how_it_works.donnez_last_name_unique: Give your blend a unique name. Each blend is prepared by hand and packaged in a stylish pouch with your personalized label.
app.sections.how_it_works.shipping_rapide_soignee: Fast and careful delivery to your home or offer it to a loved one. Your signature blend, ready to enjoy and share.
app.sections.how_it_works.assistant_intelligent_vous: Our intelligent assistant guides you to create perfect harmony. Up to 10 ingredients for an optimal balance of flavors and benefits.

app.sections.how_it_works.quatre_etapes_simples: Four simple steps to create the tea of your dreams, carefully prepared and shipped straight to your door.

app.sections.livraison_retours_page.intro: Find useful information here about served countries, delivery modes, indicative lead times, parcel tracking and how complaints are handled at My Own Tea.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.delivery_zones_p1: The My Own Tea shop currently delivers to France and Belgium.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.delivery_zones_p2: At checkout, the options shown depend on the country, postal code, chosen mode (home or relay point) and the shipping offers available in real time.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.delivery_zones_b1: Home delivery when the address is eligible.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.delivery_zones_b2: Relay-point delivery when the offer is available, with relay selection directly during checkout.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.delivery_zones_b3: Shipping charges and any free-shipping eligibility are displayed before payment validation.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.lead_times_p1: Preparation starts after payment confirmation. The timelines below are indicative and may vary depending on workshop activity and the carrier.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.lead_times_b1: Workshop preparation: generally 1 to 2 business days.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.lead_times_b2: Mainland France: generally 2 to 4 business days after shipment.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.lead_times_b3: Belgium: timing varies depending on the selected offer and carrier handover.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.lead_times_b4: During busy periods or in case of carrier disruption, the delivery time may be extended.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.tracking_p1: As soon as a parcel is handed over, a shipping confirmation email is sent. Tracking also remains available in My Account > Orders when a customer account is used.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.tracking_b1: Check your address, postal code and phone number carefully before payment.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.tracking_b2: For a relay-point delivery, collection must take place within the time limit indicated by the carrier.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.tracking_b3: If you notice a tracking or delivery issue, contact support quickly.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.returns_p1: My Own Tea does not accept convenience returns for its creations, blends, infusions and products made or assembled on demand.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.returns_p2: No spontaneous return is handled without prior approval from customer support. For a non-personalized accessory, support will first confirm whether a return procedure may apply.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.returns_b1: A simple change of mind does not automatically create a return right for My Own Tea products.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.returns_b2: Do not send any item back without prior written approval.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.claims_p1: If a product is damaged, incorrectly prepared, missing or non-compliant, write to us at {{contactEmail}} and include your order number.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.claims_b1: Specify the order number, the issue observed and, when possible, include useful photos.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.claims_b2: Each request is reviewed case by case so we can offer the most suitable solution: correction, reshipment or refund depending on the situation.
app.sections.livraison_retours_page.claims_b3: Getting in touch quickly helps us process the case more efficiently.

app.sections.order_confirmation.nous_avons_pas: We could not find this command. Check your URL or return to home.

app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.intro: This page explains which personal data is used on My Own Tea, for which purposes, with which providers and which rights you have.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.controller_p1: Personal data processed through the My Own Tea shop is used to operate the site, manage customer accounts, prepare orders, handle delivery and answer support requests.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.controller_p2: For any question relating to your data, you can contact us using the details below.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.data_b1: Customer account: salutation, first name, last name, email, phone number, date of birth when provided, addresses.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.data_b2: Order and delivery: cart, items, format, possible subscription, delivery address, relay-point choice, order statuses and shipping tracking.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.data_b3: Payment: transaction identifiers, payment status and references useful for accounting reconciliation. Full card data is entered directly with Stripe.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.data_b4: Customer relationship: messages sent through contact, support requests, order number and exchange content.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.data_b5: Marketing and consent: email, communication preferences, newsletter subscription status and consent-event log.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.data_b6: Technical data: session cookies, temporary Google sign-in cookies and local storage used for cart, shipping and language preference.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.purposes_p1: Depending on the context, processing is based on contract performance, compliance with legal obligations, your consent or legitimate interest related to security and proper service operation.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.purposes_b1: Create and manage the customer account.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.purposes_b2: Process orders, payments, subscriptions, shipments and after-sales requests.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.purposes_b3: Manage email preferences and send marketing communications only with consent.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.purposes_b4: Secure authentication, sessions and the checkout flow.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.recipients_p1: Access to data is limited to the people and providers who need it to perform the service.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.recipients_p2: Depending on the features used, some data may be processed by technical, payment, email or shipping providers.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.recipients_b1: Internal team responsible for support, orders and shop administration.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.recipients_b2: Stripe for payments and the handling of certain subscription-related elements.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.recipients_b3: Shipping providers and relay-point partners through the logistics integration used on the site.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.recipients_b4: SMTP / transactional email provider for contact, confirmation and tracking emails.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.retention_p1: Data is not kept indefinitely. It is retained for the time necessary to fulfill the relevant purpose and, when required by law, for the applicable archive period.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.retention_b1: Account data: while the account remains active, then for the time necessary for administrative follow-up or the exercise of rights.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.retention_b2: Orders and invoicing: for the applicable legal and accounting retention periods.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.retention_b3: Newsletter and marketing consent: until consent is withdrawn, the person unsubscribes or the time needed to prove and manage preferences.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.retention_b4: Session cookie: up to 30 days; temporary Google sign-in cookies: about 10 minutes.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.retention_b5: Browser local storage (cart, shipping, language preference): until deleted by the user, browser cleanup or a reset of the journey.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.rights_p1: Under applicable regulations, you notably have rights of access, rectification, erasure, restriction, objection and, where relevant, portability.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.rights_p2: You may also withdraw consent to marketing emails at any time without affecting the lawfulness of prior processing.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.rights_b1: From your customer account, you can update your personal details, addresses and email preferences.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.rights_b2: You can use the unsubscribe link included in marketing emails.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.rights_b3: To exercise your rights or ask a question about your data, write to {{contactEmail}}.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.rights_b4: If necessary, you may also lodge a complaint with the CNIL.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.cookies_p1: The site mainly uses technical cookies and storage necessary for sign-in, session handling, cart persistence, shipping choice and language preference.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.cookies_p2: At this stage, the customer journey does not include any advertising or analytics tool activated without additional information and, where required, prior consent.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.cookies_b2: Temporary cookies used to secure Google sign-in when it is used.
app.sections.politique_confidentialite_p.cookies_b3: Browser local storage for guest cart, shipping selection and language / country preference.

app.sections.subscriptions_page.none_abonnement_available: No subscriptions available at the moment.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.recevez_blends_favorites: Receive your favorite creations every month, without thinking about it. Choose your formula and enjoy continuous infusion.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.hero_title: Your favorite creations, on premium replenishment with 10% off.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.hero_body: Choose an existing creation or compose your own in the atelier, then activate replenishment every 1, 2 or 3 months from your usual purchase flow.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.hero_badge_account: Card, cancellation and invoices in My Account
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_title: Subscribe to a creation you already love
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_body: Best if you already have a favorite creation: the recipe stays the same, and you only choose the format and delivery cadence.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_benefit_one: Same creation, same flavor profile at every renewal.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_benefit_two: Choose your format and receive it every 1, 2, or 3 months.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_existing_benefit_three: Perfect for quickly restarting a creation you already know.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_title: Build a subscription that feels truly yours
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_body: If you want something more personal, create your blend in the atelier and activate replenishment once it feels right.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_benefit_one: Your subscription follows your exact custom recipe.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_benefit_two: You choose the format and rhythm from the start.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.card_creator_benefit_three: Ideal for always keeping your signature creation at home.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.step_one: Choose an existing creation or build your own, then pick the cadence that fits you.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.step_two: Place your first order with your usual delivery option.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.step_three: After that, you can manage renewals, invoices, and cancellation anytime from My Account.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_title: What to know before activating your ritual
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_one_body: No. The subscription is intentionally limited to My Own Tea creations to keep the offer coherent and premium.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_two_title: What do I need before subscribing?
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_two_body: A signed-in customer account, plus a default delivery address in your customer area.
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_three_title: How are card updates or cancellation handled?
app.sections.subscriptions_page.faq_three_body: From your customer account: card updates, cancel-at-period-end, reactivation and invoice access.

app.sections.testimonials.offert_melange_personnalise: I offered a custom blend to my team. The packaging is magnificent and the taste is there. An original gift!
app.sections.testimonials.qualite_ingredients_exceptionnelle: The quality of the ingredients is exceptional. I created a spicy mix to accompany my desserts, and my customers love it!
app.sections.testimonials.price_raisonnable_qualite: The price is very reasonable for the quality. I love being able to experiment with different combinations depending on my mood!
app.sections.testimonials.my_melange_serenite: My “Serenity” blend with chamomile and verbena is perfect after my yoga sessions. A real well-being break.
app.sections.testimonials.experience_unique_created: A unique experience! I created my “Réveil en Provence” blend with lavender and green tea. It has become my essential morning ritual.

app.sections.top_creations.none_blend_classee: No classified creations available at the moment.
app.sections.top_creations.decouvrez_blends_mieux: Discover the top-ranked creations from our community and personalize them in the workshop or add them directly to the cart.
